---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a defect
title: ''
labels: [bug]
assignees: []

---
## Reproduce
Describe steps to reproduce the issue, including the ***observed* behavior**.
Keep steps and observations concise, and provide supporting details in ticket comments.

## Expectation
Based on the reproduction steps, what was the ***expected* behavior**?

## Situation
For obvious defects, list the operating system, Python version, and package versions
(including APPXF). For broader problems, provide context about your application use
case (environment, workflow) where the behavior was observed.

## Guide
***Please remove all template text and this section before submitting.***

This template is intentionally lightweight because obvious defects usually do not
require extensive detail. Provide any of the following when available.

Reproduction and observations:
 * **code to reproduce** >> ticket comment or attachment
 * **environment** (OS, Python, and package versions) >> Situation
 * defect **frequency** (always / intermittent / once) >> Reproduce
 * **logs** >> ticket comment or attachment
 * **regression** (last known working version) >> ticket comment
 * **screenshots** (if GUI is involved) >> key image in summary, ticket comment
   otherwise

Analysis:
 * **impact** (for example, data loss) >> Situation and/or ticket comment
 * **workaround** >> ticket comment

***Thank you for reporting this defect.***
